creator: keramida@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Changes committed to ISC's sources.  The reply to my bug report mail 
includes the following: 

| From: Mark.Andrews@isc.org 
| Subject: Re: [BIND-BUGS #6910] bind-8.x typos in named.conf.5 manpage 
| To: Giorgos Keramidas <keramida@freebsd.org> 
| Cc: bind-bugs@isc.org 
|  
| 1248.   [doc]           correct some typos in named.conf.5 and corresponding 
|                         html. 
|  
|         All but the last hunk were accepted.
